('11) 11101112 1112015111111111‘11111‘1111111 MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (RAILWAY BOARD) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th November, 2016 G.S.R. 1088(E).--- In exercise 0f the powers conferred by sub-section ( 1) read with clause (b) of sub—section (2) of section 30, read with section 30A. of the Railway Claims Tribunal Act, 1987 (54 of 1987), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Seryiees of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules, 1989, namely :- 1. Short title and commencement—~- (1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Services of Chairman, ViooChairman and Members) Amendment Rules, 2016, (2) They shall be deemed to have come into force on the l"l day of January, 2016. -- 2 of 3 -- [WT mews 3(1)] use an WW : swarm 3 Substitution of new rule for rule 3:--— In the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Services of Chuinnan, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules, 1989, for rule 3, the following rule shall be subsu‘tuted, namely:- "3. Pay:-n- The Chairman Shall receive a pay ofrupees two lakh nnilfifty thousand per mensem, u Vice—Chairman shall receive a pay of rupees two latch and twenty five thousand per mensem and a Member shall receive pay in lewd-16 (Rs.205400—224400) ofpay matrix specified in Part A of the Schedule to the Railway Services (Revised Pay) Rules, 2016 published vide G.S.R. 746(E) dated the 28"1 July, 2016. The pay of the Member us on the 1" January, 2016 in the applicable level of the pay matrix shall be the [my obtained by multiplying the existing basic pay ie.‘pay drown in the existing Pay Band and Grade Pay by afitctar 0f2.5 7, rounded ojfto the nearest rupees and the figure so arrived at will be located in that level in the pay matrix and ifsuch an identicalfigure corresponds to any Cell in the applicable level of the pay matrix, the same shall be the pay, and ifno such Cell is available in the applicable level. the pay shall befixed at the immediate next higher Cell in that applicable level afthe pay matrix: Provided that in the case afappaintment as Chairman, ViceChatrman or Member ofa person who has retired as a Judge oft: High Court, or who has retiredfrom service under the Central Government or a State Government and who is in receipt or has received 9/? or has become entitled to receive any retirement benefits, by way afpension, gratuity. employer ’5 contribution to a Contributoty Provident Fund or atherforms of retirement benefits, the pay shall be reduced by the gross amount o/pension or pensionary equivalent of employer’s contribution to the (Contributm'y Provident Fund or any otherform ofretirement benq‘its, ifany, drown, or to be drawn by him. " [No.2016/TC(RCT)/1/VII CPC} RAVINESH KUMAR, Executive Director, (Public Grievances, Railway Board) Explanatofl Memorandum The Central Government has accorded approval to revise the scales of pay and certain terms and conditions of services of Chairman, Vice~Chairman and Members of the Railway Claims Tribunal with effect from 1“ January, 2016. It is certified that no Chairman, Vice-Chairman and the Members of the Railway Claims Tribunal is likely to be affected adversely by the notification being given retrospective effect. Note :- The principal rules were published vide number G.S.R. 844(E), dated the 19m September, 1989 and subsequently amended vide numbers 6.511 726 (E), dated the 6‘“ December, 1991, G.S.R. 185 (E), dated the 11'“ April, 1996, G.S.R. 436 (E), dated the 26‘h September, 1996, 6.8.12. 563 (B), dated the 7'“ September, 1993, G.S.R. 96 (E), dated the 10“" February, 1999, G.S.R. 835 (E), dated the 30m December, 1999, GtSJL 733(E), dated the 21“ September, 2000, (183. 386 (E), dated the 25‘“ May, 2001, G.S.R. 206 (E), dated the 11m March, 2002, G.S.R. 625 (E), dated the 29m August, 2008, G.S.R. 797 (E), dated the 18m November, 2008, G.S.R. 82803), dated the 12LII November, 2009, (13,11. 796(5), dated the 13‘“ November, 2014, G.S,R. 13(5), dated the 6‘“ Jammy, 2015, G.S.R. 124(5), dated the 26'“ February, 2015 and G.S.R., 500(E), dated the 12“l May, 2016.
